---
title: "Contact"
format: html
---

## 📬 Contact

<br>

<div class="card" style="text-align: center;">

<h3>Let’s connect</h3>

<p>
I’m always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and conversations.  
Feel free to reach out — I’d love to connect.
</p>

<br>

<p>
📧 <strong>Email:</strong><br>
<a href="mailto:honganly@bu.edu">honganly@bu.edu</a><br>
<a href="mailto:honganly2908@gmail.com">honganly2908@gmail.com</a>
</p>

<br>

<p>
📞 <strong>Phone:</strong><br>
(857) 284-2121
</p>

<br>

<p>
🔗 <strong>LinkedIn:</strong><br>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/an-ly/" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/an-ly</a>
</p>

<br>

<p>
💻 <strong>GitHub:</strong><br>
<a href="https://github.com/hongan2908" target="_blank">github.com/hongan2908</a>
</p>

</div>

---

<br>

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;">

<a href="experience.qmd" class="button btn-outline-primary">💼 View Experience</a>  
<a href="cv.qmd" class="button btn-outline-primary">📄 View CV</a>  

</div>
